vocabulary.english: To be distant from / Away from
vocabulary.translation: My home is very close to school.
The train station is very far from here.
My home is very close to the company.
I take the bus to school.
How long does it take from home to school?

vocabulary.example: 从家到公司要一个小时。
vocabulary.translation: It takes one hour from home to the company.
The school is on the left side of the road.
The shop is on the right.
Walk to the right and you'll be there.

vocabulary.english: To know / To be aware of
vocabulary.translation: Do you know how to get there?

vocabulary.pinyin: cóng zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ
zuò gōng gòng qì chē qù

phrases.pinyin: cóng zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ
zuò gōng gòng qì chē qù

key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ lí gōng sī yuǎn ma?
key_sentences.english: Is your company far from you?

key_sentences.chinese: 我家离公司很近，走路只要十分钟。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiā lí gōng sī hěn jìn, zǒu lù zhǐ yào shí fēn zhōng.
key_sentences.english: My home is very close to the company; it only takes ten minutes on foot.

key_sentences.chinese: 从火车站到公司怎么走？
key_sentences.pinyin: Cóng huǒ chē zhàn dào gōng sī zěn me zǒu?
key_sentences.english: How do you get from the train station to the company?

key_sentences.chinese: 你知道怎么坐公共汽车吗？
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhī dào zěn me zuò gōng gòng qì chē ma?
key_sentences.english: Do you know how to take the bus?

key_sentences.chinese: 往右边走，在路的左边就到了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǎng yòu bian zǒu, zài lù de zuǒ bian jiù dào le.
key_sentences.english: Walk to the right; it's on the left side of the road.

key_sentences.chinese: 从家到学校，我就坐公共汽车去。
key_sentences.pinyin: Cóng jiā dào xué xiào, wǒ jiù zuò gōng gòng qì chē qù.
key_sentences.english: From home to school, I simply take the bus.

grammar_points.title: 离 — Expressing Distance
grammar_points.explanation: 离(lí) is used to express the distance between two places or two points. Structure: Place A + 离(lí) + Place B + 远(yuǎn)/近(far/close). It can also be followed by a specific measurement. Note: 离(lí) cannot be replaced by 从(cóng) in this context. Examples: 我家离学校很近(My home is close to school); 这(zhè)里(lǐ)离(lí)那(nà)里(lǐ)有(yǒu)多(duō)远(yuǎn)？(How far is it from here to there?)

examples.pinyin: Wǒ jiā lí gōng sī hěn jìn.
examples.english: My home is very close to the company.

examples.pinyin: Huǒ chē zhàn lí zhè lǐ yuǎn bu yuǎn?
examples.english: Is the train station far from here?

exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 离 to express distance?
exercises.correct_pinyin: Xué xiào lí wǒ jiā hěn jìn.

exercises.question: Fill in: 公司___这里远不远？(Is the company far from here?)
What does 离 express in a sentence?
What does 离公司很近 mean?

grammar_points.title: 从...到... — From...To...
grammar_points.explanation: 从(cóng) means 'from' and 到(dào) means 'to'. Together, 从(cóng)...到(dào)... expresses a range of time or place. Structure: 从(cóng) + Start + 到(dào) + End + Verb. It can express spatial distance (from place A to place B) or temporal range (from time A to time B). Examples: 从家到公司(from home to the company); 从早上到晚上(from morning to evening).

examples.chinese: 从火车站到公司怎么走？
examples.pinyin: Cóng huǒ chē zhàn dào gōng sī zěn me zǒu?
examples.english: How do you get from the train station to the company?

examples.chinese: 从早上到晚上，他都在上班。
examples.pinyin: Cóng zǎo shang dào wǎn shang, tā dōu zài shàng bān.
examples.english: From morning to evening, he is at work.

exercises.question: What does 从...到... express?
exercises.correct: A range from start to end (place or time)
options: A range from start to end (place or time)

exercises.question: How do you say 'from home to school'?
Fill in: ___这里___公司，要走多久？(How long does it take to walk from here to the company?)
How do you say 'from here to there'?
option_pinyin: cóng zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ
lí zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ
wǎng zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ
zài zhè lǐ dào nà lǐ

grammar_points.title: 副词「就」— The Adverb jiù
grammar_points.explanation: 就(jiù) is a versatile adverb with several meanings: (1) 'right away / immediately': 我就去(I'll go right away); (2) 'only / simply / just': 就这样(just like this); (3) to connect a condition with a result (with 如果(rú guǒ)/要(yào)是(shì)): 如果(rú guǒ)你(nǐ)来(lái)，我就高兴(If you come, I'll be happy); (4) in directions: 就在那里(it's right there).

examples.chinese: 从家到公司，我就坐公共汽车。
examples.pinyin: Cóng jiā dào gōng sī, wǒ jiù zuò gōng gòng qì chē.
examples.english: From home to the company, I simply take the bus.

examples.pinyin: Wǎng yòu bian zǒu, jiù dào le.
examples.english: Walk to the right and you'll be there.

exercises.question: What does 就 mean in '往右边走，就到了'?
Fill in: 你知道路，___不用问了。(If you know the way, then you don't need to ask.)
Which sentence uses 就 to mean 'right away'?
What does 知道怎么走 mean?
option_pinyin: zhī dào zěn me kāi chē

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 请问，这里离火车站远吗？
lines.pinyin: Qǐng wèn, zhè lǐ lí huǒ chē zhàn yuǎn ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, is the train station far from here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不远，从这里到火车站走路十分钟就到了。
lines.pinyin: Bù yuǎn, cóng zhè lǐ dào huǒ chē zhàn zǒu lù shí fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
lines.english: Not far; from here to the train station is ten minutes on foot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 怎么走？往左边还是右边？
lines.pinyin: Zěn me zǒu? Wǎng zuǒ bian hái shì yòu bian?
lines.english: How do I get there? To the left or the right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 往右边走，沿着这条路走，就到了。
lines.pinyin: Wǎng yòu bian zǒu, yán zhe zhè tiáo lù zǒu, jiù dào le.
lines.english: Walk to the right, follow this road, and you'll be there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ zhī dào le, xiè xie!
lines.english: Okay, I know now; thank you!

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiā lí gōng sī yuǎn ma?
lines.english: Is your home far from the company?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 比较远，从家到公司要一个小时。
lines.pinyin: Bǐ jiào yuǎn, cóng jiā dào gōng sī yào yí gè xiǎo shí.
lines.english: It's quite far; from home to the company takes an hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你怎么来？坐公共汽车吗？
lines.pinyin: Nǐ zěn me lái? Zuò gōng gòng qì chē ma?
lines.english: How do you get here? By bus?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是的，我就坐公共汽车来，很方便。
lines.pinyin: Shì de, wǒ jiù zuò gōng gòng qì chē lái, hěn fāng biàn.
lines.english: Yes, I simply take the bus; it's very convenient.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我家离这里很近，走路就来了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jiā lí zhè lǐ hěn jìn, zǒu lù jiù lái le.
lines.english: My home is very close; I just walk here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 真好，你知道这附近有公共汽车站吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhēn hǎo, nǐ zhī dào zhè fù jìn yǒu gōng gòng qì chē zhàn ma?
lines.english: That's great. Do you know if there's a bus stop nearby?
